description_long: This is a medium-sized artificial Christmas tree with dense, green, needle-like branches arranged in a conical shape. The foliage is lush and evenly distributed, giving the tree a full and symmetrical appearance from all sides. The branches are made to resemble those of a real pine or fir tree, with a natural variation in the length and orientation of the needles. The trunk is dark and cylindrical, visible at the base, and the tree stands upright without any visible decorations or ornaments. There are no visible string lights, baubles, or a tree topper, and the branches are free from artificial snow. The tree is designed to be placed indoors or outdoors in urban settings such as parks, plazas, or building entrances.
description: A dense, green artificial Christmas tree with realistic needle-like branches and a dark central trunk, standing upright and undecorated. The tree has a full, symmetrical conical shape and no visible ornaments or lights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tree's full, conical shape and dense, layered branches with the trunk partially visible at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tree's symmetrical profile and the even distribution of branches, with the trunk slightly less visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the tree, maintaining the same dense foliage and conical form, with the trunk mostly hidden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tree's consistent fullness and the trunk more clearly at the base.
